post.summary: Search over indexed documents (semantic or hybrid)

get.description: Returns 200 while the process is running. Does not touch dependencies.
Probes PostgreSQL (including pgvector), Redis, and object storage, then includes cached startup provider capability results. Returns 200 when every required dependency is healthy, otherwise 503.
